headline: Nearly every Kindle is steeply discounted at Best Buy
summary: Best Buy is offering steep discounts on nearly all Kindle models. The Kindle Paperwhite is reduced to an all-time low of $124.99 ($35 off). This sale is part of Best Buy's 'Black Friday in July' event.

headline: Apple’s rumored ‘Upgrade’ program brings lease-to-own pricing for iPhones, Macs, and iPads
summary: Apple is reportedly launching a new 'Apple Upgrade' program. It will offer lease-to-own options for iPhones, Macs, and iPads. Users can upgrade early or keep their device at the lease end.

headline: Twitch will let parents stop their teens going live
summary: Twitch is introducing new parental control features for teen accounts. Parents can now prevent their 13- to 17-year-old children from going live. Guardians will receive weekly email summaries of their teen's activity.

headline: Anthropic’s $1.5 billion book piracy settlement approved by judge
summary: A federal judge has approved Anthropic's $1.5 billion settlement. This resolves a class action lawsuit over AI training on copyrighted books. Authors are expected to receive approximately $3,000 for each book.

headline: Disney Layoffs Hit Hundreds of Staff, With Pixar Cuts Reportedly in Part Due to Underperformance of Hoppers
summary: Disney has laid off hundreds of employees across various departments. Pixar animation studio was particularly impacted by the recent cuts. Underperformance of the film 'Hoppers' is cited as a contributing factor for Pixar's layoffs.

headline: Fantagraphics' Bitchy! The Exasperating Existence of Midge McCracken Collects the Entire Award-Winning Series
summary: Fantagraphics is releasing a new graphic novel: 'Bitchy! The Exasperating Existence of Midge McCracken.' The massive collection compiles the entire award-winning comic series. Indie comics fans are highly encouraged to check it out.

headline: The Blood of Dawnwalker: Meet a Brand New Devious Creature in Fresh Gameplay
summary: Exclusive new gameplay from 'The Blood of Dawnwalker' has been released. It introduces a brand new, devious creature to the game. The pixie character is shown to have an unusual obsession with teeth.

headline: The Terminator: How Makinarium’s Master Prop Makers Are Bringing an Iconic Part of the T-800 Back to Life
summary: Makinarium and Pinewood Studios are creating an exclusive Terminator collectible. They are meticulously reproducing the iconic T-800 Optics. Only 800 hand-finished pieces will be available worldwide.

headline: Ann Widdecombe was hit on head 21 times with hammer, prosecutors say
summary: Prosecutors allege Ann Widdecombe was attacked with a hammer. She was reportedly struck 21 times while eating lunch at her Devon home. Joshua Kerry, 28, is accused of the assault and stealing her wallet.

headline: Burnham tells cabinet to tackle living costs at first meeting
summary: New Prime Minister Burnham held his inaugural cabinet meeting. He instructed his cabinet to prioritize tackling the rising cost of living. The meeting followed an announcement of a VAT cut on household electricity.

headline: London-based civil servants offered move to No 10 North in Manchester
summary: London-based civil servants are being offered relocation packages. They have the opportunity to move to 'No 10 North' in Manchester. This move aims to decentralize government operations.

headline: Argentina's Fernandez defends team after ugly scenes in World Cup final loss to Spain
summary: Midfielder Enzo Fernandez defended the Argentina team after their World Cup final loss. The match against Spain was marred by ugly scenes. Fernandez asserted Argentina represented their nation "in the best possible way."
